prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: The environmental permit application pertains to operations regulated by the Environment Agency, which oversees environmental matters in England. Consequently, it does not apply to Scotland, where environmental regulation is handled by the Scottish Environment Protection Agency (SEPA).
